name: The Black & Decker Corporation
description: The Black & Decker Corporation is a leading global manufacturer and marketer of power tools, hardware, home improvement products, and technology-based fastening systems. Founded in 1910 and headquartered in Towson, Maryland, the company pioneered the portable electric drill and has since established a strong reputation for innovation and quality in consumer and professional products. In 2010, Black & Decker merged with Stanley Works to form Stanley Black & Decker, though the Black & Decker brand continues to operate as a key brand for consumer power tools and appliances worldwide.
